seoTitle: Catumnal vs Caulfield East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Catumnal and Caulfield East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Catumnal vs Caulfield East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Catumnal and Caulfield East.
heading: Catumnal vs Caulfield East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Catumnal, Victoria and Caulfield East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caulfield East has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Catumnal (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Catumnal or Caulfield East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Catumnal has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Caulfield East scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Catumnal scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Caulfield East scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Catumnal or Caulfield East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caulfield East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
